chapter_title: Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal
article_title: Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits
text: Except as provided in Sections 12513, 12514, and 12814.6, no license to drive shall be issued to a person under the age of 18 years.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 1. Persons Required to Be Licensed, Exemptions, and Age Limits [12500 - 12527]
##### § 12512

Except as provided in Sections 12513, 12514, and 12814.6, no license to drive shall be issued to a person under the age of 18 years.

*(Added by Stats. 2000, Ch. 596, Sec. 6. Effective January 1, 2001.)*

subsections.text: Except as provided in Sections 12513, 12514, and 12814.6, no license to drive shall be issued to a person under the age of 18 years.
